title: leontodon saxatilis subsp. rothii
intro: Leontodon saxatilis subsp. rothii, also known as the autumn hawk's beard or autumn dandelion, is a plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae) that is native to Europe and parts of Asia. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and even exhibiting antioxidant properties. Leontodon saxatilis subsp. rothii can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal use, and it has been used in traditional herbal remedies for centuries.
